our products

CUSTOM BUILT

Custom orders are built in 8–12 weeks with your choice of dimensions, finishes, and materials. We walk you through options during a free consultation. Price match guarantee on USA competitors.

Specifications
  • Standard size shown: 24" W x 76" H x 19" D
  • Base: optional 4" high base can be added
  • Weight: approx. 175 lbs
  • Base price: $649 · Colors: Black, Light Grey, Dark Grey, Maple
  • Lead time: 8–12 weeks — custom dimensions, finishes, and materials

Accessories

Lock Box & Stick Rack

View accessories →

finishing touches

locker accessories

Dial in every detail – airflow, storage, comfort, and branding.

Cushions

+ $75.00 (top or bottom) / $150.00 (both)

High-density foam cushions upholstered for comfort and durability – available on the top, bottom, or both.

Hooks

$15.00

Additional interior hooks for bags, helmets, and everyday gear, matched to your locker layout. Available in black or silver.

Name Plate

+ $10.00

Clean, simple name plate for player identification – ideal for teams that want a classic, organized look. Available in black or silver.

Skate Hooks

+ $25.00

Additional wall-mounted hooks positioned for skates or gear, perfect for hockey or figure skating locker rooms.

Custom Logo

+ $75.00

Team or program branding applied to the locker face – reinforce your identity every time players walk in.

Lock Box & Stick Rack

Lock box with digital key lock (+$80) and stick rack (from $299). View details and request a quote.

View accessories →

Get a free custom design consultation. Our team will help you choose the perfect locker solution for your program and budget.
